# RemarkaPave LLC

RemarkaPave LLC is a commercial pavement maintenance contractor based in Ponca City,
Oklahoma (74604), serving Kay County (Ponca City, Newkirk, Tonkawa, Blackwell), the
Tulsa metro (Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Owasso, Bixby, Jenks, Sand Springs, Claremore), and
Bartlesville, Oklahoma.

## Services
- Parking lot line striping: ADA-compliant layouts, re-stripes, fire lanes, arrows,
  and stencils. PROMAR solvent-based acrylic traffic paint, applied with a Titan
  PowrLiner 2850. Priced per stall.
- Asphalt sealcoating: recommended every 2-3 years in Oklahoma (season roughly
  April-October). Priced per square foot.
- Crack filling & routing: hot-applied. Priced per linear foot.
- Commercial pressure washing: hot water with a 20-inch surface cleaner; year-round.
  Priced per square foot.
- Parking lot sweeping: weekly, monthly, or quarterly schedules; per-visit pricing.
- Oil stain removal: bundled with service visits.
- ADA & fire lane compliance: stalls, access aisles, symbols, and curbing, itemized.
- Stencils & markings: arrows, STOP bars, crosswalks, custom stencils, per marking.
- Pavement repair & specialty work (potholes, mill & overlay, wheel stops): custom quote.
- The RemarkaReport (pavement assessment): documented lot walk with photos, condition
  grades, and a prioritized maintenance plan; free with any estimate.
- RemarkaPave Care Plan: recurring maintenance program in three tiers (Essential,
  Protect, Total Care).

## Pricing
RemarkaPave does not publish unit rates. Every job receives a free written quote with
materials and labor broken out, usually within one business day. A $600 job minimum
applies; smaller services are bundled into a service visit.

## Contact
- Phone: (580) 304-7225
- Email: Todd@remarkapave.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Website: https://remarkapave.com
- Free quotes: https://remarkapave.com/free-quote/

RemarkaPave is licensed and insured, owner-operated, and provides free estimates with
a written materials-and-labor breakdown.
